payload.answer: I can’t tell who “he” refers to or what “the other one” is. Please clarify the person and the item/preference before I can suggest a memory update.
repair_options: Specify what options/items “the other one” contrasts with.
Provide the full preference statement, e.g., “[Person] prefers [specific option] over [other option].”
If this relates to an existing memory, identify which memory or preference it should be compared against.
